value: Unfortunately, the standard messaging app doesn't display which phone number initiated a group text—you'll only see the list of participants as you've found. The most straightforward way forward would be to reach out to the person directly through another channel (a call, email, or social media) and ask for their number, then add them to your contacts. If you'd like to explore other messaging options that might offer more detailed thread information, feel free to reach out and we can discuss what's available.
